generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer for ambient temperature monitoring with ±0.5°C accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn ThermalIncubatorSystem
]
instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer for heatbed temperature monitoring with ±0.5°C accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn ThermalIncubatorSystem
]
instance BoxInteriorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer for box interior temperature monitoring with ±0.5°C accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:producedData BoxInteriorTemperatureDataTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn ThermalIncubatorSystem
]
instance AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor,
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message containing ambient temperature readings from DS18S20 sensor"
]
instance HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor,
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message containing heatbed temperature readings from DS18S20 sensor"
]
instance BoxInteriorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BoxInteriorTemperatureSensor,
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message containing box interior temperature readings from DS18S20 sensor"
]
instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values based on thermal models"
]
instance TemperatureRegulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Heating or cooling action based on bang-bang control logic",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance ModelParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters for improved prediction accuracy"
]
instance FaultAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Alert triggered by temperature deviation beyond acceptable limits",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models (Model A and B)",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]
instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time bang-bang control for temperature regulation with configurable upper/lower limits and heating/waiting durations",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureRegulationAction
]
instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration via non-linear least squares optimization using Scipy",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterUpdateInsight
]
instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection through temperature deviation monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertAction
]
instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical sensors and virtual twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, BangBangControlService, FaultDetectionService
]
instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for executing real-time control and prediction logic",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, BangBangControlService, FaultDetectionService
]
instance ScipyOptimizationLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares parameter calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]
instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub-hosted open-source code repository for hardware/software specifications",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]
instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamic model with parameters C_air (air thermal capacity) and G_box (box thermal conductance)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiController, ScipyOptimizationLibrary
]
instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamic model with parameters C_heater (heater thermal capacity), C_air, G_heater (heater conductance), and G_box",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiController, ScipyOptimizationLibrary
]
instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ambient temperature measurement data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiController, ScipyOptimizationLibrary
]
instance HeatbedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time heatbed temperature measurement data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiController, ScipyOptimizationLibrary
]
instance BoxInteriorTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time box interior temperature measurement data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData BoxInteriorTemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiController, ScipyOptimizationLibrary
]
instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed controlled via MOSFETs driven by Raspberry Pi GPIO with 4A current requirement",
    base:isContainedIn ThermalIncubatorSystem
]
instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan operating with signal isolation via optocouplers on PCB",
    base:isContainedIn ThermalIncubatorSystem
]
instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs for heatbed control and optocouplers for signal isolation",
    base:isContainedIn ThermalIncubatorSystem
]
instance RaspberryPiHardware : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware",
    base:isContainedIn ThermalIncubatorSystem
]
instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ volume), heatbed (214×214×3 mm), fan (0.02 m³/s airflow), three DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and a power supply",
    base:contains HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, AmbientTemperatureSensor, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, BoxInteriorTemperatureSensor, RaspberryPiHardware, PCB
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands to activate/deactivate heatbed and fan sent via RabbitMQ to the Raspberry Pi controller, which drives MOSFETs on the PCB to control physical actuators based on bang-bang control logic."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized DT constellation comprising RabbitMQ communication server, Raspberry Pi-based controller with bang-bang logic, low-level driver for sensor/actuator interaction, and thermal prediction models with calibration algorithms integrated via message-passing architecture."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase, with models continuously updated to reflect the current state of the physical incubator during active use for thermal regulation and prediction."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through uniform temperature experiments (three sensors) showing maximum 7°C discrepancy without fan voltage adjustment, reduced to 6°C with 18V fan; Model B demonstrated superior prediction of thermal inertia compared to Model A via residual error minimization during calibration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "AMQP-based communication via RabbitMQ message broker between physical controller and DT components, with message queues handling sensor data ingestion and actuator command delivery."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "DT components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B with integrated Wi-Fi and Bluetooth."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol in low-level driver to prevent unsafe states; optocouplers used for electrical isolation between control signals and high-current actuators to ensure operational safety."
]
